exampleSentences: Hôm nay trời rất mát nên em muốn đi dạo công viên.
Anh thích uống nước mát sau khi tập thể dục xong.
Phòng này có điều hòa nên luôn cảm thấy mát vào mùa hè.

translation.en: The weather today is very cool.

notes_md:
**mát** means *cool* in a pleasant way — not cold, just comfortably cool. It describes weather, air, water, skin, or drinks.

It comes after the noun and works directly as the predicate (trời mát, nước mát) — no “là” needed. It can also mean *refreshing*, especially for drinks or a feeling on the body.

Strong opposite: **nóng** (hot). Close synonym: **mát mẻ** (a bit softer, more “cool and fresh” feeling).

definitions.en: Having a temperature that is lower than normal; cool.
definitions.vi: Có nhiệt độ thấp hơn bình thường; mát.
definitions.es: Tener una temperatura que es más baja de lo normal; fresco.

example.es: El clima está muy fresco hoy.
example.vi: Hôm nay thời tiết rất mát.
example.en: The weather is very cool today.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Today the weather is very cool so I want to walk in the park.
I like to drink cool water after exercising.
This room has air conditioning so it always feels cool in the summer.
